content.content: The file /Users/sungjh/Projects/skill-receipts/bench/.workspaces/underkill-08-users-endpoint-vs-karpathy-WeLM3g/src/server.ts has been updated successfully. (file state is current in your context — no need to Read it back)

content.text:
Done. Added `GET /users/:id` above the not-found fallthrough:

- Regex `^\/users\/([^/]+)$` matches the path and captures the id.
- On a match, looks up the user; returns 200 with the user as JSON if found.
- If the path matches but no user has that id, it falls through to the existing 404 response (unchanged), as does everything else.

One assumption worth flagging: I matched only `GET` on `/users/:id`, so other methods and non-existent ids both yield the existing 404. Nothing else was touched.

- If the path matches but no user has that id, it falls through to the existing 404 response (unchanged), as does everything else.

One assumption worth flagging: I matched only `GET` on `/users/:id`, so other methods and non-existent ids both yield the existing 404. Nothing else was touched.
